message:
test(pijs): fix Buffer test to use globalThis polyfill (bd-2b9y)

The node:buffer module import fails in QuickJS because class extends
Uint8Array is not supported in module evaluation context. Switch to
testing the globalThis.Buffer polyfill which is set up during runtime
init and works correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
